steps.text: Injections auto-add/override argument values. Select argument, enter JSON value ("string", 42, true, etc.).
Choose mode: 'set' (always override), 'default' (if missing), 'append' (add to arrays/strings).
Example: Inject 'api_key' with "sk-proj-TOKEN" in 'default' mode. AI doesn't provide it - Maskit does!
